content.en:
Bloodbone Territory.

After Ye Tian separated from the Stargazing Lord, he went straight here and came to the void area outside the Blood Bone Territory.

At this time, his gaze passed through the space-time barrier of the Blood and Bone Territory and saw the interior of the Blood and Bone Territory.

He saw some half-step Eternal Realms, slowly gathering resources within the Flesh and Bone Territory.

The Blood and Bone Territory is rich in resources, and even if it is dangerous, there are still many half-step Eternal Realms who are willing to enter this place and take risks.

"This seat is the Endless Lord, and he is about to cleanse the Bloodbone Territory, so in order to prevent the Ripple Lord, leave the Bloodbone Territory immediately. "

Ye Tian's voice entered the Blood Bone Territory and was heard by many half-step Eternal Realms.

Suddenly, some half-step Eternal Realms left the Blood and Bone Territory, but there were still a very small number of half-step Eternal Realms that did not leave.

For these people who are unwilling to leave, Ye Tian no longer dissuades them, once there are any special changes caused during the battle, or it affects their "Nine Zero Seven" and makes them fall and die, it is their own choice.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Blood Bone Territory and came straight to the Black Sea.

Bang!!!

A large number of black-scaled beasts sensed Ye Tian's arrival and besieged them one by one.

The strength of these black-scaled beasts was uneven, some were comparable to the supreme black-scaled beasts, and some were comparable to the black-scaled beasts of the half-step Eternal Realm, but the black-scaled beasts comparable to the Immortal Realm did not appear, and were still sleeping in the depths of the Black Sea.

"Die!"

Ye Tian spit out a word, and the large number of black-scaled beasts turned into corpses, and they fell into the Black Sea one by one, and the Black Sea within the territory of hundreds of millions of people was instantly silent.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian used the legendary eternal technique, the Will Slashing Void Sword, and slashed at the sleeping black-scaled beast in the depths of the Black Sea.

Poof!

This Will Legendary Eternal Technique directly slashed at the opponent's body, and even erased part of the opponent's consciousness.

Roar!!!!

The Immortal Realm Black-scaled Beast let out a scream and woke up from its slumber.

Suddenly, the entire Black Sea boiled, and even the Bloody Bone Territory shook, and a blood-colored force swept across the Bloody Bone Territory.

Those half-step Eternal Realms that were still stranded in the Blood and Bone Territory were eroded by these blood-colored powers, and immediately turned into corpses, falling and dying one by one, only a few powerful half-step Eternal Realms used some secret treasures to barely save their lives and escape in time.

"Comparable to a four-step Immortal Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian really understood the strength of this black-scaled beast, and he was not worried at all.

Next, he used his Void True Body and Will Wall Light to put himself in an invincible position, and he used various legendary eternal technique attacks again and again, so that this Immortal Realm Black Scale Beast had no ability to resist at all. When the Immortal Realm Scale Beast was seriously injured, Ye Tian used his sharp Eternal Technique, the Hundred Million Void!

Airplanes!!!

Another layer of void began to be suppressed in the Immortal Realm, as if an endless layer of void had been formed.

In the blink of an eye, the Immortal Realm Black-scaled Beast was completely suppressed into countless fragments, and countless body particles lost their vitality.

Such an Immortal Realm black-scaled beast was killed by Ye Tian in one move.

After killing this black-scaled beast, the biggest threat to the Blood Bone Territory was gone, but Ye Tian still needed to understand where that blood-colored power came from.

He could feel that although the black-scaled beast had some relationship with the blood-colored power, the blood-colored power was not exerted by the black-scaled beast.

Deep in the Black Sea.

Ye Tian came here, and his will continued to explore here.

Soon, his will probed a red mountain range, which was an undersea mountain range, but it was not very large.

In fact, this is not a real submarine seamount, but a bone.

What's more, this bone still has a faint vitality.

Ye Tian approached this bone and felt a terrifying coercion, this must be a skeleton of a legendary-level lord-level creature.

When Ye Tian touched this bone, a scarlet power rushed in, but it was blocked by Ye Tian's will wall light.

But even so, Ye Tian was still impacted, but he was not injured.

"The blood-colored power of the Flesh and Bone Territory should come from it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After his observation, he found that the bone was almost connected to the Bloodbone Territory, and it was difficult to separate it from the Bloodbone Territory.

In other words, the source of the original power of the blood and bone power is this bone, and if it is stripped away, even if the blood and bone territory can exist, it will become an extremely ordinary territory, and it will have little value.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to study this legendary lord creature skeleton that still exuded a little vitality.

He didn't want that blood-colored power to erupt often, otherwise the Bloodbone Territory would not be suitable for cultivation, and he didn't dare to bring the half-step Eternal Realm of the human race here.

After a long period of research, Ye Tian found that the bone power was too strong, and the Blood and Bone Territory was unable to absorb this power in time, causing the power to escape........

Presently.

Ye Tian has two ways to relieve this situation, the first way is to arrange a large array to absorb bone power, so that no blood-colored power shock wave will be formed; the second way is to upgrade the blood and bone territory to the eternal space-time territory, so that the blood and bone territory needs to be upgraded, it will increase the absorption of bone power, so as to completely solve this trouble.

Therefore, the second option is the most appropriate.

"Let's use the second method!"

Ye Tian decided.

However, it is slightly more difficult to promote a space-time territory like the Bloodbone Territory to an Eternal Space-Time Territory, and it is a little more difficult than other space-time territories.

However, he is an Immortal Realm Lord, and if he refines the Blood and Bone Territory, he can accelerate the evolution of the Blood and Bone Territory.

Just like some Immortal Realm Lords, after occupying a space-time territory, even if there are no treasures that will promote the space-time territory, after countless eternal years, the space-time territory will still slowly evolve into an eternal space-time territory.

This is the feedback that the Immortal Realm Lord has given to the space-time territory.

For example, Ye Tian broke through in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and now the Dark Forbidden Domain has been expanding, and although the speed of expansion is many times slower, it is still slowly getting bigger, and more resources are being born.

this day.

Ye Tian began to refine the Blood Bone Territory.

The way for the Eternal Realm to refine the space-time territory is to refine the innate eternal rules in the space-time territory with its own innate eternal rules, so as to completely ban the innate eternal rules 4.5 here, and refine the origin of space-time and earth to become a lord.

Rumble!!!!

The innate eternal rules of the Blood and Bone Territory were simply no match for an Immortal Realm lord, and they were easily refined by Ye Tian here.

Soon, Ye Tian's innate eternal rule power eroded the origin of the Blood and Bone Territory and began to refine the origin of the Blood and Bone Territory.

With the passage of time, the Blood Bone Territory was gradually refined by Ye Tian.

Finally, on this day, the Bloodbone Territory completely became Ye Tian's Territory.

He became the lord of the Flesh and Bone Realm.

Subsequently, he reported the matter of the Flesh and Bone Territory becoming his own to the Lords Alliance, announcing the ownership of this place.

In other words, from today onwards, no half-step Eternal Realm is allowed to enter the Blood and Bone Territory to exploit resources privately, and the resources here will belong to Ye Tian alone in the future. _
